title: F1 2018 Boat
description: This is a Formula 1 2018 texturepack by AdamixGaming and Jerpix | required OptiFine!!!
body:
Safety car
all boat with chest (without bamboo raft)
No command is needed to spawn the Safety Car

oak_boat

    Ferrari 5,7
    Alfa Romeo 16,9

spruce_boat

    Alpha Tauri 28,10
    Haas 8,20

birch_boat

    Renault 27,55

jungle_boat

    RedBull 33,3

acacia_boat

    Mclaren 14,2

dark_oak_boat

    MercedesAMG 44,77

cherry_boat

    Racing Point 11,31

mangrove_boat

    Williams 18,35

**How to specify**

    Fixed version only

/summon boat ~ ~ ~ {Type:"oak | spruce | birch | jungle | acacia | dark_oak | cherry | mangrove",CustomName:"\"<car number>_<| hypersoft | ultrasoft | supersoft | soft | medium | hard | superhard | intermediate | wet>\""}

Example

/summon boat ~ ~ ~ {Type:"spruce",CustomName:"\"28_superhard\""}
